text: No person shall operate a manually or traffic actuated signal other than for the purpose of permitting a pedestrian or vehicle to cross a roadway.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 2. Traffic Signs, Signals, and Markings [21350 - 21468]
#### Article 3. Offenses Relating to Traffic Devices [21450 - 21468]
##### § 21463

No person shall operate a manually or traffic actuated signal other than for the purpose of permitting a pedestrian or vehicle to cross a roadway.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: No person shall operate a manually or traffic actuated signal other than for the purpose of permitting a pedestrian or vehicle to cross a roadway.
